Car Alloy Wheel

Ball Bearing Assembly
Complete deep groove ball bearing assembly with inner ring, outer ring, balls and cage modeled individually then assembled using NX constraints and component patterns.

Curved fan blade designed using Spline curves, Studio Surface, Thicken and Circular Pattern. Complex freeform surface modeling with draft angle and trim operations.

SolidWorks — Dassault Systèmes

SolidWorks
Bench Vice Assembly
Full workshop bench vice with 11 individual components — body, sliding jaw, jaw plates, vice screw, slide key, knobs, pins, collar and handle — assembled with mate constraints to simulate working clamping motion.
Multi-Part Assembly Mate Constraints Mirror Component Motion Study Vice Screw Sub-Assy
SolidWorks
Exhaust Manifold — 4-Cylinder
4-into-1 automotive exhaust manifold designed using Sweep along 3D path, Boss Extrude, Fillet and Mirror. Smooth pipe transitions from 4 exhaust ports converging to a single outlet collector.
3D Sweep Shell Feature LPattern Fillet & Chamfer Automotive
SolidWorks
Planetary / Internal Gear Train
Gear train assembly with internal ring gear, central sun gear and two planet gears. Assembly includes motion study animation demonstrating gear ratio and power transmission kinematics.
ISO Gear Standard Assembly Mates Motion Study Gear Ratio Rotation Animation
